response.overview: UBER FAMOUS is Jen Kober at her most honest, joyful, and laugh-out-loud funny—sharing stories about family, identity, and the beautifully messy road to self-acceptance. With warmth, wit, and fearless humor, she finds comedy in everyday moments and the strange surprises that come with unexpected fame. It’s big laughs with an even bigger heart… and proof that no level of success guarantees a decent haircut.
response.title: Jen Kober: Uber Famous
